name: Statute of Limitations Deficiency Bar

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must affirmatively plead the statute of limitations as a defense in a Tax Court proceeding to eliminate the proposed tax liability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: If the Tax Court determines that the assessment or collection of a tax is barred by the statute of limitations, the law mandates a decision of no deficiency.
